---
title: "P.5 Transient 3D beam vibration with affine material parameters"
format:
  html:
    theme:
      light: flatly
    page-layout: full
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
---

![](videos/P5_banner.mp4)


## Problem Setup


<img src="https://github.githubassets.com/images/modules/logos_page/GitHub-Mark.png" alt="GitHub logo" width="32" height="32" style="vertical-align:middle; margin-right:8px;"/>[Link](https://github.com/suparnob100/scikit-rom/tree/main/examples/computational_mechanics/dynamic/linear/problem_1)


![](examples_docs/P5.pdf){width="85%" height="1000px"}
